artifacts.npm-pack-skill-files.txt: skill-related files in npm pack --json --dry-run output
artifacts.tui-doctor.json: doctor --json output for the isolated dogfood session
artifacts.tui-create.json: session creation output for the hello-prompt fixture
artifacts.tui-wait-ready.json: wait output for the READY prompt
artifacts.tui-screenshot-echo.json: screenshot command output for the echoed prompt
artifacts.tui-inspect-final.json: inspect output after the fixture exited
artifacts.screenshots/hello-prompt-echo.png: copied screenshot proof from the isolated session
artifacts.recordings/hello-prompt.cast: asciicast recording of the dogfood-tui flow
artifacts.recordings/hello-prompt.webm: webm recording of the dogfood-tui flow
artifacts.agent-tty-home.txt: temporary isolated home path used for the session
